_comment: ILO Social Protection Data Dashboard importer configuration. The ILO SDMX API is publicly accessible. Edit indicator codes or countries to change what data is fetched.

source._comment: ILO SDMX REST API base URL.

indicators._comment: Map from internal field name to ILO series reference area + indicator combination. Values are SDMX indicator codes within the SOC_PROT dataflow.

output._comment: Path to write the enrichment JSON file, relative to this config file.
